text.message: Oh I thought I was last
This is going to be an interesting game with me paying half attention
luckily you are giving that advice to a bot
This is why we will never beat Chris or john
this is going to be a quick game I think
if Patrick builds a road he has 8 points
shouldn't we be trying to not let John win??
you accepted my trade offer too!
Exactly - don’t accept trade offers from him!
Screw this no one else is united
If no one is then it’s pointless
